headline: Is Broadridge Financial Solutions (BR) Now Attractive After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you have been wondering whether Broadridge Financial Solutions is sensibly priced or starting to look interesting, you are in the right place for a clear look at what the current share price might imply. The stock last closed at US$196.88, with a 5.9% return over the past week, 3.6% over the past month, a 10.7% decline year to date, and a 17.0% decline over the last year, set against 51.1% and 47.9% returns over the past 3 and 5 years respectively. headline: Is Broadridge (BR) Quietly Rewiring Market Plumbing With Tokenization While Boosting Shareholder Payouts?
summary: In early March 2026, Broadridge Financial Solutions announced a US$0.975 quarterly cash dividend per share and unveiled new leadership and product initiatives, including the appointment of a Chief Growth and Strategy Officer and an enhanced Pass-Through Voting experience on its ProxyVote platform, following strong traction in its tokenization and distributed ledger activities. Together, these developments highlight Broadridge’s effort to pair shareholder returns with investment in tokenized...
